subject: revert(export): restore pxToPt=1 for full-resolution PDF pages
body:
Reverted pxToPt=0.5 change — halving page dimensions optimized for
phone viewing but sacrificed the full platform resolution needed for
sharing/uploading designs. The PDF should preserve 1:1 pixel quality.

Kept: document.fonts.ready wait and PDF metadata (title/creator) as
these are independent quality improvements.

Tags: export, pdf, revert
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: pdf-export
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_01KjQd21oxBZydfDAu8v7xaY
title: restore pxToPt=1 for full-resolution PDF pages
